SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION DEC-15-2000, CONTINUED BY COURT TO JAN-19-2001 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 CONTINUANCE IS FOR AN AUTHORIZED REPRESENTATIVE OF DEFENDANT TO APPEAR.
